yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Fortinet_Issues_Emergency_Patch_for_Fort {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Fortinet Issues Emergency Patch for FortiClient Zero-Day"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-07"
    strings:
                $kw0 = "FortiClient" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_CVE202635616_Fortinet_fixes_actively_exp {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-35616: Fortinet fixes actively exploited high-severity flaw"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-07"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-35616" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-35616: Fortinet fixes actively exploited high-sever"; content:"CVE-2026-35616"; nocase; sid:5059117; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
